description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build IDE examples that runs on every pull request. The workflow performs cross-platform builds to ensure the Core and toolchain work correctly. It consists of four jobs: a sanity check on ubuntu-latest, and builds on ubuntu-latest for Linux with different LwIP versions and chunks, on windows-latest for Windows, and on macOS-latest for macOS. Each job checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.x, and uses caching for the tools/dist directory.
